title: Bootstrap Phase 0a closure
summary: Phase 0a delivered the M1 primitive package skeleton under lib/internal/packages/@pancreator/, the unscoped meta package at lib/internal/packages/pancreator, workspace build/lint/typecheck scripts, and the phase-0a-verification.md record capturing observed command exits.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
